name: Feedback API
body: [{"type": "p","children": [{"text": "Feedback API provides a way to send information about user activity on the web page to power our ML and personalization algorithms."}]},{"type": "callout","children": [{"type": "callout-item","children": [{"text": "This is a low level API, we recommend you to use the Findify Merchant JS, or the Findify Feedback JS to speed up the integration."}]}],"appearance": "info"},{"type": "p","children": [{"text": "Sends analytics information in order to help the personalization algorithm deliver more relevant items to the user."}]},{"type": "h2","children": [{"text": "Generic structure"}]},{"type": "p","children": [{"text": "The rid (request id) parameter can be gathered from the Search API call preceding the click-through."}]},{"type": "code_block","lang": "json","children": [{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "{"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "    \"event\": \"EVENT NAME\", //REQUIRED, Event name"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "    \"properties\": {"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "        // HERE ARE THE PROPERTIES RELATED TO EACH EVENT"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "    },"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "    \"key\": string, //REQUIRED, Merchant API Key"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "    \"t_client\": timestamp, //REQUIRED, Timestamp client in milliseconds"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "    \"user\": {"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "        \"uid\": string,      //REQUIRED, Permanent User ID"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "        \"sid\": string,      //REQUIRED, Session ID"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "        \"ip\": string,       //REQUIRED, IP of the customer"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "        \"ua\": string,       //REQUIRED, User-agent"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "        \"lang\": [string],   //OPTIONAL, Languages"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "        \"email\": string     //OPTIONAL, User email"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "    }"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "}"}]}]},{"type": "h2","children": [{"text": "Click-suggestion event"}]},{"type": "p","children": [{"text": "Should be sent every time the user will click on the Autocomplete Search Suggestion item."}]},{"type": "code_block","lang": "json","children": [{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "{"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "    \"event\": \"click-suggestion\","}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "    \"properties\": {"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "        \"rid\": string,  //REQUIRED, Request id preceding the clickthrough"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "        \"suggestion\": string //REQUIRED, Suggestion that is clicked"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "    }"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "}"}]}]},{"type": "h2","children": [{"text": "Click-item event"}]},{"type": "p","children": [{"text": "Should be sent every time the customer clicks through the Product Cards in any of our widgets: Autocomplete, Search Results, Smart Collections or Recommendations."}]},{"type": "code_block","lang": "json","children": [{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "{"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "    \"event\": \"click-item\","}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "    \"properties\": {"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "        \"rid\": string,      // REQUIRED, Request id preceding the clickthrough, can be retrieved from the preceding Search API response"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "        \"item_id\": string,   // REQUIRED, Item ID clicked"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "      \t\"variant_item_id\": string //REQUIRED, Variant ID clicked"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "    }"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "}"}]}]},{"type": "h2","children": [{"text": "Page redirect event"}]},{"type": "p","children": [{"text": "Should be sent every time when the user submits a search query that has a Page Redirect setup in Maropost Merchandising Cloud (formerly Findify)."}]},{"type": "code_block","lang": "json","children": [{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "{"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "     \"event\": \"redirect\","}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "     \"properties\": {"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "        \"rid\": string,  // REQUIRED, Request id preceding the redirection"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "        \"suggestion\": string // REQUIRED, Suggestion that leads to the redirection"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "     }"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "}"}]}]},{"type": "h2","children": [{"text": "Purchase event"}]},{"type": "p","children": [{"text": "Should be sent once the Order is confirmed."}]},{"type": "callout","children": [{"type": "callout-item","children": [{"text": "Order Return\n","bold": true}]},{"type": "callout-item","children": [{"text": "If the customer returns (all or part of) an order, there is unfortunately, no event that can be sent to remove the order from our analytics. If the Purchase event is sent to Merchandising Cloud - that means that the order is successfully completed with the assumption that it won't be returned."}]}],"appearance": "info"},{"type": clicked"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "        \"quantity\": int,       // REQUIRED, Quantity bought,"}]},{"type": "code_line","children": [{"text": "        \"rid\": string,      //
